CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:DriveAuthorizationHelper.kt:CachingDriveAuthorization$currentCacheKey == null || cached.cacheKey != currentCacheKey || cached.expiresAtMs <= elapsedRealtime() || cached.token.token != accessToken.token

DestructuringDeclarationWithTooManyEntries:CloudBackupWalletRows.kt:val (label, color, fill, border, icon) = when (status) { CloudBackupWalletStatus.DIRTY -> StatusBadgeStyle("Dirty", colors.warning, colors.warningFill, colors.warningBorder, Icons.Default.WarningAmber) CloudBackupWalletStatus.UPLOADING, CloudBackupWalletStatus.UPLOADED_PENDING_CONFIRMATION, -> StatusBadgeStyle("Syncing", colors.cloudBlue, colors.cloudBlueFill, colors.cloudBlue.copy(alpha = 0.48f), Icons.Default.Refresh) CloudBackupWalletStatus.CONFIRMED -> StatusBadgeStyle("Confirmed", colors.success, colors.successFill, colors.successBorder, Icons.Default.Check) CloudBackupWalletStatus.FAILED -> StatusBadgeStyle("Failed", colors.danger, colors.dangerFill, colors.dangerBorder, Icons.Default.WarningAmber) CloudBackupWalletStatus.DELETED_FROM_DEVICE -> StatusBadgeStyle("Not on device", colors.warning, colors.warningFill, colors.warningBorder, Icons.Default.DoNotDisturbOn) CloudBackupWalletStatus.UNSUPPORTED_VERSION -> StatusBadgeStyle("Unsupported", colors.warning, colors.warningFill, colors.warningBorder, Icons.Default.WarningAmber) CloudBackupWalletStatus.REMOTE_STATE_UNKNOWN -> StatusBadgeStyle("Unknown", colors.secondaryText, colors.cardFill, colors.cardBorder, Icons.Default.WarningAmber) }
ForbiddenComment:CoveApplication.kt:// TODO: make these configurable and store in database

MaxLineLength:AboutDebugSection.kt:text = { Text("Clears local keychain and DB backup state but keeps Google Drive files intact. Use this to test the recovery flow.") }
MaxLineLength:AboutSettingsScreen.kt:Text("Clears local keychain and DB backup state but keeps Google Drive files intact. Use this to test the recovery flow.")
MaxLineLength:AboutSettingsScreen.kt:text = { Text(if (currentlyEnabled) "This will hide experimental features" else "This will enable experimental features") }
MaxLineLength:BackupExportScreen.kt:infoMessage = "Unable to save to password manager. Make sure a password manager is set up on your device. Password has been copied to your clipboard."
MaxLineLength:BackupExportScreen.kt:text = { Text("Save the backup password to your password manager so you can retrieve it later during import.") }
MaxLineLength:BackupExportScreen.kt:text = { Text("This backup will contain all your wallet private keys. Make sure you keep the file and password secure.") }
MaxLineLength:BackupImportScreen.kt:text = { Text("This will import wallets and restore settings from the backup. Existing wallets with the same fingerprint will be skipped.") }
MaxLineLength:BackupImportScreen.kt:tint = if (fileData != null) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
MaxLineLength:BackupVerifyScreen.kt:tint = if (fileData != null) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface

MaxLineLength:CloudBackupDetailContent.kt:body = "This passkey provider can't create the secure passkey required for Cloud Backup. Try again with a supported password manager such as Google Password Manager, 1Password, or Bitwarden."
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupDetailContent.kt:body = "Your cloud backup is not accessible until you use an existing passkey or add a new one. Without it, your backups can't be restored."
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupEnableOnboardingContent.kt:text = "Cloud Backup is end-to-end encrypted before it leaves your device and stored in Google Drive, secured by a passkey that only you control."

MaxLineLength:CloudBackupEnableOnboardingContent.kt:text = "I understand that I need access to my Google account. If I lose access to my passkey or my Google account, my Cloud Backup won't be recoverable."
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupEnableOnboardingContent.kt:text = "I understand that my passkey is required to access my Cloud Backup. I must not delete my passkey."
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupPresentationHost.kt:"Add a new passkey to restore access to your cloud backup. Until you do, your backups can't be restored."

MaxLineLength:CloudBackupPresentationHost.kt:"Creating a new Cloud Backup will not include wallets from your previous backup. If you still have access to the passkey named Cove Cloud Backup (${it.nameSuffix}), use that passkey instead."
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupPresentationHost.kt:message = "Confirming your updated cloud backup can be decrypted and restored. Continuing may ask for your passkey."
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupPresentationHost.kt:message = "Verify your updated cloud backup now to confirm it is accessible. Continuing may ask for your passkey."
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupScreen.kt:"This will rebuild the backup index from wallets on this device. Wallets that only exist in the cloud backup will no longer be referenced."
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupScreen.kt:"This will replace your entire cloud backup. Wallets that only exist in the current cloud backup will be lost."

MaxLineLength:CloudBackupWalletRows.kt:CloudBackupWalletStatus.DELETED_FROM_DEVICE -> StatusBadgeStyle("Not on device", colors.warning, colors.warningFill, colors.warningBorder, Icons.Default.DoNotDisturbOn)
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupWalletRows.kt:is CloudSyncHealth.AuthorizationRequired -> Triple(Icons.Default.WarningAmber, colors.danger, "Google Drive access needs to be reconnected: ${syncHealth.v1}")
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupWalletRows.kt:is CloudSyncHealth.NoFiles -> Triple(Icons.Default.CloudOff, colors.secondaryText, "No cloud backup files uploaded yet")
MaxLineLength:CloudBackupWalletRows.kt:is CloudSyncHealth.Unavailable -> Triple(Icons.Default.CloudOff, colors.secondaryText, "Google Drive is unavailable")
MaxLineLength:CoinControlContainer.kt:message = "The wallet could not be opened for coin control. Please try again from the wallet screen."
MaxLineLength:CoveApplication.kt:CoveApplication$Log.d(TAG, "[LIFECYCLE] < ${AUTO_UNLOCK_THRESHOLD_PIN_ONLY}s since lock (PIN only, no decoy), auto-unlocking")
MaxLineLength:CustomFeeRateSheet.kt:message = "The fee rate you entered is too high, we automatically selected a lower fee"
MaxLineLength:CustomFeeRateSheet.kt:val computed = presenter.erroredFeeRate?.let { minOf(it + CustomFeeRateConstants.FEE_RATE_EPSILON, fast3) } ?: fast3

MaxLineLength:DisableCloudBackupSection.kt:"Disabling Cloud Backup will permanently delete your current Cove cloud backups from cloud storage. Wallets already on this device will stay on this device, but they will no longer be backed up to cloud storage."
MaxLineLength:DisableCloudBackupSection.kt:text = { Text("Disabling Cloud Backup will permanently delete your current Cove cloud backups from cloud storage.") }
MaxLineLength:LockView.kt:screen == Screen.BIOMETRIC && (auth.type == AuthType.BIOMETRIC || auth.type == AuthType.BOTH) && isBiometricAvailable
MaxLineLength:LockView.kt:text = "Cove needs permissions to use biometric authentication to unlock your wallet. Please open settings and enable biometric authentication."

MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt:MainActivity$"Some wallet databases couldn't be encrypted. Your wallets still work and encryption will retry on next launch.\n\nIf this persists, please contact feedback@covebitcoinwallet.com"
MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt:MainActivity$Log.w(TAG, "[STARTUP] bootstrap completed despite timeout — migration warning (if any) was lost and will retry on next launch")
MaxLineLength:MainActivity.kt:MainActivity$Log.w(TAG, "[STARTUP] resumePendingCloudUploadVerification failed before startup routing", error)

MaxLineLength:MainActivityStartupViews.kt:"Cove found Cloud Backup data for the selected Google account. This will erase the damaged local data on this device, then verify your passkey during restore."
MaxLineLength:MainActivityStartupViews.kt:"This will permanently delete wallet data on this device. Make sure your recovery phrases are backed up before continuing."
MaxLineLength:MainSettingsScreen.kt:text = { Text("This is a very experimental feature. Use with caution. This is mostly used by developers for testing purposes.") }
MaxLineLength:MoreInfoPopover.kt:snackbarHostState.showSnackbar("Labels imported successfully, but transaction list may need manual refresh")
MaxLineLength:OnboardingCloudBackupEnableViews.kt:subtitle = "Cloud Backup makes it easier to restore this wallet's configuration and labels if you lose this device."

MaxLineLength:OnboardingCloudBackupEnableViews.kt:text = "Enabling this also turns on Cloud Backup for Cove more broadly, so compatible wallets you create later, as well as wallet labels, will be backed up."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingCloudBackupEnableViews.kt:text = "This backs up the imported hardware wallet configuration and labels stored in Cove so you can restore this wallet view later."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingCloudBackupEnableViews.kt:text = "Your wallet backup is end-to-end encrypted before it leaves your device, stored in Google Drive, and locked with a passkey only you control."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingCloudRestoreProgressViews.kt:text = "${report.labelsFailedWalletNames.size} restored wallet(s) had labels that could not be imported"
MaxLineLength:OnboardingCloudRestorePromptViews.kt:text = "Your passkey is stored securely by your passkey provider, and your encrypted backup is stored in Google Drive app data."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingPromptViews.kt:subtitle = "Cove can't check for a Google Drive backup right now. You can continue onboarding and check Cloud Backup later in Settings."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingPromptViews.kt:subtitle = "We couldn't find a Cove backup in Google Drive for this account. Continue without a backup, then set up Cloud Backup when you're ready."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingRecoveryWordsViews.kt:text = "Write these down exactly in order and keep them offline. Anyone with these words can control your Bitcoin."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingTermsViews.kt:text = "I understand that Cove is not a bank, exchange, or licensed financial institution, and does not offer financial services."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingTermsViews.kt:text = "I understand that I am responsible for securely managing and backing up my wallets. Cove does not store or recover wallet information."
MaxLineLength:OnboardingTermsViews.kt:text = "I understand that if I lose access to my wallet, Cove cannot recover my funds or credentials."
MaxLineLength:OtherBackupsSection.kt:OtherBackupsRecoveryResult$add("Your current Cloud Backup passkey is unchanged. Verify your current passkey to make sure it opens your active backup.")
MaxLineLength:OtherBackupsSection.kt:Text("This will use the selected passkey once to decrypt these other backups. Your current Cloud Backup passkey will not change.")

MaxLineLength:OtherBackupsSection.kt:text = "${pluralize(namespaceCount, "backup set", "backup sets")} protected by ${otherPasskeyLabel(passkeySuffixes)}, containing ${pluralize(walletCount, "wallet", "wallets")}"
MaxLineLength:OtherBackupsSection.kt:text = { Text("These backups cannot be recovered later, even if you find the passkey that currently protects them.") }
MaxLineLength:QrCodeScanView.kt:drawLine(color, Offset(size.width - cornerLength, size.height), Offset(size.width, size.height), strokeWidth)
MaxLineLength:QrCodeScanView.kt:drawLine(color, Offset(size.width, size.height - cornerLength), Offset(size.width, size.height), strokeWidth)
MaxLineLength:ReceiveAddressSheet.kt:Text("This address has already received funds. For better privacy, create a new address before sharing.")
MaxLineLength:SecretWordsScreen.kt:"Your seed words are sensitive and control access to your Bitcoin. QR codes are machine-readable, so be careful who or what device you show this to."
MaxLineLength:SendFlowContainer.kt:message = "The wallet could not be opened for sending. Please try again from the wallet screen."
MaxLineLength:StartupRecovery.kt:"App startup timed out. Please force-quit and try again.\n\nPlease contact feedback@covebitcoinwallet.com"
MaxLineLength:TapCardNfcManager.kt:TapCardNfcManager$// create TapSignerReader using factory function (workaround for UniFFI async constructor limitation)
MaxLineLength:TapSignerAdvancedChainCode.kt:"Enter your custom 32-byte chain code below. If you're unsure, select automatic on the previous screen."
MaxLineLength:TapSignerChooseChainCode.kt:"You can provide your own chain code for advanced setups, or let the app create one automatically for easy setup."

MaxLineLength:TapSignerConfirmPinView.kt:"The PIN code is a security feature that prevents unauthorized access to your key. Please back it up and keep it safe. You'll need it for signing transactions."
MaxLineLength:TapSignerNewPinView.kt:"The PIN code is a security feature that prevents unauthorized access to your key. Please back it up and keep it safe. You'll need it for signing transactions."

MaxLineLength:TapSignerSetupSuccessView.kt:"If you haven't already done so please download your backup and store it in a safe place. You will need this and the backup password on the back of the card to restore your wallet."
MaxLineLength:TransactionDetailsWidget.kt:AutoSizeText(primary, color = primaryColor, maxFontSize = 15.sp, minimumScaleFactor = 0.90f, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold)
MaxLineLength:TransactionsRows.kt:message = "Unable to delete transaction: ${e.localizedMessage ?: e.message ?: "Unknown error"}"
MaxLineLength:VerificationCompleteScreen.kt:text = "All set! You've successfully verified your recovery words and can now access your wallet."
MaxLineLength:VerifyWordsContainer.kt:"Whoever has your secret words has access to your bitcoin. Please keep these safe and don't show them to anyone else."
MaxLineLength:VerifyWordsScreen.kt:"Are you sure you want to skip verifying words? Without having a backup of these words, you could lose your bitcoin"
MaxLineLength:WalletSettingsContainer.kt:android.util.Log.e(tag, "failed to leave wallet settings after recovery failure", result.navigationError)

UnreachableCode:AndroidPasskeyProvider.kt:AndroidPasskeyProvider$return runBlocking { try { val activity = ForegroundUiBridge.requireActivity() val response = credentialManager.createCredential( activity, CreatePublicKeyCredentialRequest( requestJson = buildCreateRequestJson(rpId, challenge, user), ), ) val registration = response as? CreatePublicKeyCredentialResponse ?: throw passkeyRequestFailed( PasskeyOperation.REGISTRATION, PasskeyFailureReason.UnexpectedCredentialType, ) validatePasskeyRegistrationPrf(registration.registrationResponseJson) PasskeyRegistrationResult( credentialId = extractCreatedCredentialId(registration.registrationResponseJson), providerAaguid = extractCreatedProviderAaguid(registration.registrationResponseJson), registeredPlatform = PasskeyRegistrationPlatform.ANDROID, ) } catch (error: Exception) { if (error is CancellationException) throw error throw mapPasskeyCreateError(error) } }

UnreachableCode:AndroidPasskeyProvider.kt:AndroidPasskeyProvider$return runBlocking { try { val activity = ForegroundUiBridge.requireActivity() val response = credentialManager.getCredential( activity, buildGetCredentialRequest( requestJson = buildAssertionRequestJson(rpId, null, prfSalt, challenge), preferImmediatelyAvailableCredentials = false, ), ) val credential = response.credential as? PublicKeyCredential ?: throw PasskeyException.NoCredentialFound() DiscoveredPasskeyResult( prfOutput = extractPrfOutput(credential.authenticationResponseJson), credentialId = extractCredentialId(credential.authenticationResponseJson), ) } catch (error: Exception) { if (error is CancellationException) throw error throw mapPasskeyGetError(error, PasskeyOperation.DISCOVER_ASSERTION) } }
UnreachableCode:BackupExportUtils.kt:app.alertState = TaggedItem( AppAlertState.General( title = "Backup Saved!", message = "Your backup has been saved successfully!", ), )

UnreachableCode:SendFlowHardwareImportRoute.kt:val record = try { db.getTxThrow(txId = parsed.txId()) } catch (e: Exception) { throw IllegalArgumentException(TransactionImportErrors.TRANSACTION_NOT_FOUND, e) }

UnreachableCode:TapSignerNfcHelper.kt:TapSignerNfcHelper$return performTapSignerCmd(TapSignerCmd.Setup(cmd)) { resp -> when (resp) { is TapSignerResponse.Setup -> resp.v1 else -> throw Exception( "Unexpected response type for Setup command: ${resp?.javaClass?.simpleName}", ) } }

UnreachableCode:TapSignerNfcHelper.kt:TapSignerNfcHelper$return performTapSignerCmd(TapSignerCmd.Setup(cmd)) { response -> when (response) { is TapSignerResponse.Setup -> response.v1 else -> throw Exception( "Unexpected response type for Setup command: ${response?.javaClass?.simpleName}", ) } }
